entity.summary: Polygon decentralized perpetual exchange protocol supporting leveraged trading, with substantial historical derivatives volume and residual current protocol liquidity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies DPEX as a Polygon decentralized perpetual exchange with up to 50x leverage and reports residual current TVL plus substantial cumulative trading volume. Recent trading-volume windows were not exposed in the reviewed snapshot and no terminal shutdown evidence was recovered, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead.

evidence.title: DPEX project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: DPEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies DPEX as a Polygon decentralized perpetual exchange, reports residual current TVL and substantial cumulative trading volume, and supports conservative limited classification.

evidence.title: DPEX derivatives discovery entry
evidence.notes: Derivatives candidate corpus independently identifies DPEX as a Polygon decentralized derivatives exchange.
